messages.title: Memory Game
messages.description: Flip cards on the 4x4 grid and match every pair. Mismatched cards flip back.
messages.mismatchDescription: Those two cards do not match. Try another pair.
messages.startFailed: Failed to start the memory game right now. Please try again in a moment.
messages.sessionExpired: This memory game session has expired. Use /memory-game to start a new run.
